junior_employee.description: General staff member — can view all published HR policies and their own personal records only
example_allowed_queries: What is the remote work policy?
How many sick days am I entitled to?
Who is the manager of the Engineering department?
What is the maternity leave policy for contractors?
example_blocked_queries: What is the salary band of John Doe?
Show me all employees in the Finance department
What was Maria Lopez's performance rating?

hr_professional.description: HR team member — full access to employee records, all policies, and org chart within their assigned scope
example_allowed_queries: What is the salary band of employee ID 42?
How many employees are based in the Madrid office?
Who reports directly to the Head of Engineering?
What is John Doe's contract type and start date?
example_blocked_queries: What is the CEO's total compensation package?
Show me the board-level salary data

hr_manager.description: Senior HR leadership — full unrestricted access to all HR data including compensation and performance
example_allowed_queries: What is the average salary band distribution across departments?
Which employees are on Band5 in the Engineering department?
Show me all employees on contractor contracts in London
What is the full org chart for the Data department?
